grant_title: Faculty UNYTE Translational Research Network Pilot Award
eligible_applicant_type: Faculty from other UNYTE member institutions
geographic_restrictions: Restricted to University of Rochester faculty collaborating with faculty from UNYTE Translational Research Network institutions (New York State)
project_area: Translational health research with a focus on new inter-institutional collaborations
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements; eligibility is based on institutional affiliation and collaborative structure
eligibility_summary: Proposals must involve a new or expanded collaboration between a University of Rochester faculty member and at least one principal investigator from a UNYTE member institution. The contact PI must have a primary appointment at the University of Rochester. Faculty may participate as PI, MPI, or faculty sponsor/primary mentor on only one submission per award category. Any faculty member with a current grant overlapping aims is ineligible.
